name: openclaw-native-memory-citations
description: Native OpenClaw plugin for cited local memory search and retrieval.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:build:check: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js --check
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run plugin:build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
